title: Cloudy with a Chance of Cannonballs
expandedDescription: Cloudy with a Chance of Cannonballs is a local PvP game where players battle their friends with airships.

Each ship has cannons on both sides and can shoot different cannonball types at opponents. Supply drops float above the clouds and provide power-ups such as speed boosts, repairs, ammo changes, faster fire rate, and occasional hazards.
Special events can also change the match, including storms that sweep ships away and armageddon events that fill the arena with bombs.
The game was made in Unity by a team of six students over a semester. It was voted fifth best out of 28 submitted projects and was selected to be shown at FLEGA Cafe.

I was one of two programmers on the project. I was responsible for airship movement, boosting, shooting, input actions, ammo types, join screen logic, player management, score tracking, and several supply drop systems.
